channel.title: World News, Today World News, Latest International News, World Breaking News, Trending News of World - Times of India
channel.description: World News Today: Read the latest world news headlines, Current International breaking news world wide. In depth analysis and top news headlines world wide.
channel.copyright: Copyright:(C) Tue, 05 May 2026 15:27:06 IST Bennett Coleman & Co. Ltd, http://in.indiatimes.com/policyterms/1554651.cms

image.title: World News, Today World News, Latest International News, World Breaking News, Trending News of World - Times of India

item.title: Unsung heroes: Amish volunteers rebuild dozens of homes and bridges for free after Hurricane Helene in North Carolina
item.description: Amish volunteers from Pennsylvania are providing crucial aid in western North Carolina, months after Hurricane Helene caused widespread destruction. These skilled workers are rebuilding homes and infrastructure without pay, offering a powerful example of community-driven recovery. Their quiet, dedicated efforts are restoring stability and hope in devastated mountain towns, demonstrating the impact of selfless service.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Buried for a century: 409 gold coins discovered under a Russian home, but the owner is still unknown
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: NASA just turned a retired Boeing 777 into a powerful airborne science lab: How a passenger jet became a flying laboratory for 100 scientists
item.dc:creator: TOI Science Desk

item.title: Ukraine, Russia announce separate ceasefires ahead of Moscow’s Victory Day
item.description: Ukraine announced a ceasefire starting May 5-6, prioritizing human life over Victory Day commemorations, with President Zelenskyy criticizing Russia's focus on parades. Russia, however, declared its own truce from May 8-9, coinciding with WWII Victory Day, and warned of massive retaliation if Kyiv disrupts their celebrations.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Why were Louis Sammartino reaction videos struck? YouTuber Outdoor Boys move fuels LosPollosTV copyright fight and online outrage
item.description: Louis Sammartino’s LosPollosTV faces backlash after Outdoor Boys content linked to Luke Nichols triggers copyright strikes. His viral reaction clip and his father’s “disturbing” remark fueled debate. Fans largely backed original creators, questioning reaction videos. The clash highlights a bigger issue, how fair use works online and where creators draw the line between content sharing and ownership.
item.dc:creator: Sehjal Gupta

item.title: Gun scare near White House: Person shot by law enforcement at Washington Monument
item.description: Law enforcement shot an individual near the Washington Monument on Monday, triggering a brief White House lockdown. Emergency services transported an adult male to the hospital, while a teenager received treatment for minor injuries. The incident, occurring close to a presidential event, adds to recent security concerns in the capital.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Chirayu Rana took leave for dad's death in 2024 but his father is alive; says he doesn't know anything about JP Morgan row
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: ‘My goal was not immigration’: Oxford law graduate chooses India to avoid future regret
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Viral clip shows IShowSpeed landing punch on fan during Puerto Rico appearance
item.description: Popular streamer IShowSpeed's recent public appearance in Puerto Rico took a dramatic turn when a playful boxing-style moment with a fan went viral. During a meet-up, Speed landed a strong punch, causing the fan to stumble, which quickly ignited online discussions and exaggerated claims of a knockout. This incident highlights the unpredictable nature of his content tours.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: “Bizzare attacks against me”: Candace Owens alleges Ben Shapiro lawsuits as Laura Loomer responds with strong criticism
item.description: Candace Owens and Laura Loomer are in a heated public dispute, with Owens accusing Ben Shapiro of legal attacks and Loomer challenging her claims. The conflict includes allegations about lawsuits, private data access, and media influence. Other figures like Ana Kasparian are also involved. Many claims remain unverified, making the situation complex and still developing.
item.dc:creator: Sehjal Gupta

item.title: Failed H-1B lottery 7 times, moved to Canada: Indian-origin Microsoft techie gets Green Card through EB-1
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: 'Buy Spirit Airlines' website crashes as everyone wants in: 'Movement overwhelmed our servers'
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: 150-million-year-old soft tissue fossil discovery strengthens Darwin’s theory of evolution
item.dc:creator: TOI Science Desk

item.title: Viral TikTok DoorDash driver Olivia Henderson hit with felony charges, pleads not guilty
item.description: A DoorDash driver faces felony charges for unlawful surveillance and misdemeanor for sharing a video of a customer inside his home. The driver claimed she felt unsafe, but authorities found no crime committed by the customer. The incident sparked a debate on safety versus privacy, leading to the driver's arrest and job loss.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: Hidden underground ‘city’ built by ants discovered in Brazil after shocking concrete test
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: A woman’s casual walk turns into a jackpot: More than 2,000 ancient coins were unearthed in a field in the Czech Republic
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: xQc ignites online storm with bold gender dynamics take on female police officers during livestream
item.description: Felix xQc Lengyel sparked debate after sharing views on female police officers giving commands during a May 3 livestream. His comments divided fans, with some agreeing and others criticizing him. He later explained that gender can affect different policing situations. The discussion quickly spread online, adding to recent attention around his statements on esports and public topics.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: Cooler, Variable Week Ahead: Met Office says northerly winds will cut UK warmth; frosts and showers follow
item.description: The UK is set for a significant shift to cooler weather in early May, with daytime temperatures dropping after a recent warm spell. Forecasters predict a mix of sunshine, clouds, and showers, alongside morning frosts, as northerly winds take hold. This change signals a move from settled warmth to typical springtime variability across the nation.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: 'Can a neighbor hear a gunshot?': Chilling forensic details emerge in murders of two Bangladeshi students in US
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Meto Komori and Yuhi Chito suspension shocks fans as VSPO! hides details behind contract violation claims
item.description: VSPO! has suspended Meto Komori and Yuhi Chito for two months over contract violations but has not shared details. Both VTubers apologized without explaining the issue. The company confirmed the cases are separate. Reporter More Kazahana called the punishment strict based on limited facts. The situation remains unclear, leaving fans waiting for more clarity.
item.dc:creator: Global Sports Desk
